summary: Iteration 147: Dumb Functionality Checklist - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Trial banner urgency at <=2 days threshold, (2) Trial-to-Pricing flow with /pricing?from=trial&highlight=plus, (3) Pricing page trial awareness with upgrade banner and Plus highlight, (4) Star Chart fuzzy search matching partial names and typos, (5) SmartDock mini-controls wired to real Web Audio API via MixerContext, (6) EMERGENT_LLM_KEY verified working via Gemini chat endpoint.
test_credentials: Admin: kyndsmiles@gmail.com / password. Trial test users: trial_test_XXX@test.com / testpass123
seed_data_creation: Multiple trial test users created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'dumb checklist' items verified working. Trial banner shows urgency copy at <=2 days (line 14 TrialBanner.js). Trial banner navigates to /pricing?from=trial&highlight=plus (line 22). Pricing page detects params and shows trial upgrade banner + Plus card highlight. Star Chart fuzzy search uses fuzzyMatch function (lines 1266-1280) with debounced input. SmartDock uses useMixer() hook (line 586) with mute toggle and volume slider wired to masterGainRef.gain.value. MixerProvider wraps all routes in App.js (lines 260-292).

trial_banner_urgency.urgency_state: Shows 'Only X days left on your Plus trial' with red styling at <=2 days
trial_banner_urgency.test_result: PASS - days_left returned correctly from my-plan endpoint
